arts.ttl: Arsenal and Man Utd receive SHOCK Gyokeres update
arts.sum: Neither Arsenal nor Manchester United are expected to sign Viktor Gyokeres this year, according to a report. Arsenal and Man Utd receive SHOCK Gyokeres update

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Bellingham EYED, Gyokeres SURPRISE, Williams BOOST
arts.sum: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Bellingham EYED, Gyokeres SURPRISE, Williams BOOST Due to uncertainty surrounding the futures of Jorginho and Thomas Partey - as well as their age - Arsenal are looking at young, dynamic midfielders and Bellingham has appeared on their radar as a versatile, high-potential option.

arts.ttl: Man Utd face Viktor Gyokeres competition as European giants make January transfer move
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is a big fan of Sporting Lisbon's star striker Viktor Gyokeres, but Manchester United have now fallen even further behind in the race for his signature

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal & Man Utd should AVOID signing Gyokeres or Osimhen in January
arts.sum: Victor Osimhen and the aforementioned Gyokeres have both been heavily linked with a mid-season move to Old Trafford, however both Arsenal and Man Utd may be wise to wait until the summer window before signing a new centre forward. The pair have notched a combined five Premier League goals so far this season, and Ruben Amorim is determined to purchase a more consistent goalscorer as he looks to spark Man Utd into life during the second-half of the season.

arts.ttl: Man United and Ruben Amorim 'dealt Viktor Gyokeres transfer blow as Sporting star makes a decision on his future'
arts.sum: Man United have faced a setback in their bid to reunite Viktor Gyokeres with Ruben Amorim. United have struggled for goals this season; only four teams have scored less in the league.

arts.ttl: Preview: Sporting Lisbon vs. Porto - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's Taca da Liga clash between Sporting Lisbon and Porto, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
